task_completion.description: The agent launches the virtual globe or map application (e.g., Marble).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application window for Marble or a similar virtual globe software is visible on the desktop.

task_completion.description: The agent navigates to Mount Everest using search or manual panning.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search bar contains 'Mount Everest' or coordinates '27.98, 86.92', or the map is centered on the Himalayan mountain range.

task_completion.description: The agent adjusts the view altitude to approximately 50km.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status bar or scale indicator shows an altitude/distance value near '50 km'.

task_completion.description: The agent ensures the atmosphere layer is enabled before the first capture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map view shows a blue atmospheric glow, haze, or halo around the horizon/earth limb.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the first screenshot as 'everest_with_atmosphere.png'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog is open with the filename 'everest_with_atmosphere.png' or a terminal command is typed to capture the screen to this path.

task_completion.description: The agent disables the atmosphere layer via the application settings or view menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent unchecks 'Atmosphere' in a 'View' or 'Legend' menu, or the map view visibly changes to show a black sky/sharp contrast.

task_completion.description: The agent saves the second screenshot as 'everest_without_atmosphere.png'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog is open with the filename 'everest_without_atmosphere.png' or a terminal command is typed to capture the screen to this path.

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the actual map software GUI to change settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor is seen clicking menus or map controls; the agent does not simply edit image files in an editor.

integrity.description: The agent does not copy pre-existing solution files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not use 'cp', 'mv', or file manager drag-and-drop to move files from a hidden/external source to the target directory.

integrity.description: The visual state of the application changes between the two saves.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window shows the atmosphere present in the first phase and absent in the second phase within the same session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Location: Mount Everest (27.9881 N, 86.9250 E). Visuals: With atmosphere enabled, the limb of the earth or horizon should have a blue glow/haze. With atmosphere disabled, the sky should be black and the terrain edge sharp.
